overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character with green hair descending from a covered walkway into a sunny urban street, walking through a busy intersection with NCPD presence, and continuing along an industrial path with large graffiti murals. The environment features cyberpunk architecture with elevated highways, digital billboards, and industrial structures.

events.description: exits covered walkway into bright outdoor urban environment

agents.ego_description: descending concrete stairs in covered walkway toward street level

linear fluorescent light fixtures mounted on the left wall
rough concrete walls lining the stairway
yellow metal handrails along the right side of stairs

segments.scene_description: The character descends a covered concrete stairway illuminated by fluorescent tube lights. The enclosed space has rough concrete walls and metal handrails, with a few pedestrians visible ahead. At the end of the segment, the character approaches the exit to the bright outdoor street.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban commercial sidewalk with digital billboards

events.description: turns right to follow the sidewalk along the main street
white sedan drives past on the street to the left

agents.ego_description: walking along busy sidewalk following pedestrians in sunny urban environment

pedestrian in pink shirt and blue pants walking ahead

entered.detail: white rectangular speed limit sign showing 40
large vertical digital billboard displaying VIPER advertisement with pink graphics
massive concrete and steel highway overpass structure
gray concrete commercial building with small windows

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway, the character walks along a sunlit urban sidewalk with moderate pedestrian traffic. An NCPD officer walks nearby, and a large digital billboard for VIPER is visible ahead. The character passes a speed limit sign and continues alongside a concrete commercial building as vehicles drive past on the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection beneath elevated highway overpasses

events.description: crossing the street at intersection with traffic lights
entering industrial area with scaffolding and large pipes

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection and walking under massive overpass structures

notable_agents.action: NCPD officer crossing the street alongside the character
black SUV driving on the road

entered.detail: metal scaffolding structure against industrial building
large cylindrical industrial pipes running along the building
green metal railing along the edge of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the street at an intersection, moving from the commercial sidewalk into a more industrial area beneath elevated highway ramps. An NCPD officer crosses alongside, and industrial scaffolding and large pipes become prominent on the right. The digital billboard recedes into the distance as the character enters the shadow of the overpass structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial walkway with graffiti-covered concrete walls

events.description: passing large LOCAL PATRIOTS graffiti mural painted on right wall

agents.ego_description: walking along industrial path beside graffiti-covered wall with occasional pedestrians passing by

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow top walking in opposite direction

entered.detail: concrete wall with large red and blue graffiti reading LOCAL PATRIOTS with American flag pattern
large cylindrical metal storage tanks behind fencing
tall futuristic tower visible in the distance between buildings

segments.scene_description: Walking along a narrow industrial path, the character passes a massive concrete wall covered in red and blue LOCAL PATRIOTS graffiti. The area is flanked by industrial storage tanks and scaffolding, with elevated highways overhead. The lighting becomes diffused as the character moves deeper into the industrial zone, with occasional pedestrians walking in the opposite direction.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a character transitions from a dim, enclosed concrete stairwell into a bright urban center and finally into a shadowed industrial zone. It begins within a covered walkway illuminated by fluorescent tube lights, moving past rough concrete walls and metal handrails toward a bright exit. As the character emerges into the sunlight, the scene opens onto a busy urban sidewalk featuring an NCPD officer and a large digital billboard for VIPER. The camera then follows the character across a street intersection, shifting from the commercial district into the heavy shadows of elevated highway ramps where industrial scaffolding and pipes become prominent. Finally, the path narrows into a gritty industrial corridor, passing massive concrete walls covered in red and blue LOCAL PATRIOTS graffiti and storage tanks under a diffused light.
